title: Mama Huevo Pack
description: Great vanilla + modpack that fits right in immersion and gameplay! Works intended on pc, and has compatibility for the steam deck! As well as controller support for console players merging to pc!
body:
Great vanilla + modpack that fits right in immersion and gameplay! Works intended on pc, and has compatibility for the steam deck! As well as controller support for console players merging to pc!
  Adds many visual mods such as Hold my Items! (HMI), Visuality, 3D SKins, Chat Heads and much more!
  Many structures were added and configured to be spread far enough while not being to distant and/or cluttered. Explore the structures with the explorer's compass mod!
  QoL changes such as Bordeless Fullscreen, Ambient sounds, Clumps, shader support and voxy support!
  Many performance enhancing mods that will make it feel like you're running a nasa computer while not giving up any quality changes!
  Hope you enjoy the pack, and more updates will come in the future!
